mismatches.fact: V0 GO/NO-GO 항목 11: 25개 스키마 코드 생성
mismatches.detail: PART2 states '25개 스키마' but CLAUDE.md §10 says '24개 스키마'. PART2 v15.0.0 changelog added AutonomyLevelSchema (24→25), which may not be reflected in CLAUDE.md. Discrepancy exists between PART2 and CLAUDE.md.

mismatches.fact: V0 GO/NO-GO 항목 12: I-1~I-3, I-5, I-19 스켈레톤 (5개, I-4 제외)
mismatches.detail: CLAUDE.md §10 lists 'I-1~I-5 + I-19 스켈레톤' (6 modules). PART2 says 'I-1~I-3, I-5, I-19 (5개, I-4 제외)' based on READINESS §2.7. The two sources differ on whether I-4 is included in V0 skeleton generation.

match_details.detail: CLAUDE.md §10 V0 section has 16 items. Match.
CLAUDE.md §10 V1 section has 21 items. Match.
CLAUDE.md §10 V2 section has 14 items. Match.
CLAUDE.md §10 V3 section has 11 items. Match.

match_details.fact: V1→V2 전환 조건: QoD>=0.85(30일), RAG 정확도>=60%, 메모리 오류<1%, P0 100%, 비용 초과 없이 30일, 사용자 승인
V2→V3 전환 조건: QoD>=0.90(60일), 2-tier LLM 최적화, P1 고급 테스트, Self-evo 체계, V3 비용 재검토, Loki+Grafana 배포
정본 우선순위: RULE 1.3 > PLAN 3.0 > DESIGN LOCK > DESIGN 본문 > 스키마
P2 자동 OFF: 세션 종료 시 즉시 비활성
match_details.detail: MASTER_SPEC §17.3 confirms 'P2 자동 OFF: 세션 종료 시 즉시 OFF'. Match.
MASTER_SPEC confirms 'Docker 샌드박스 필수 (네트워크 차단, 30초)'. Match.
12 SOURCE_CONFLICT items are self-documented with resolution evidence.
MASTER_SPEC lists 39 files in §0. PART2 lists 43 (39 + CLAUDE.md + Guide + Review + etc.). Reasonable expansion.

match_details.fact: SDAR NEVER_AUTO 완전성: 10항목 전체 코드 반영
match_details.detail: Cross-cut review item consistent with SDAR SOT.

missing.detail: PART2 §7.5.2 mentions '승인 타임아웃 10분 auto-deny' from CLAUDE.md §7.3 but MASTER_SPEC §7.9 specifies different values: 기본 30분, P2 무제한. This is a potential conflict not surfaced in PART2.

MASTER_SPEC §7.14 lists 12 workflow patterns (Sequential, Parallel Fan-out, Map-Reduce, Router, Retry-with-Backoff, Saga, Pipeline, Observer, Mediator, Chain of Responsibility, State Machine, + 1 more). PART2 §7 does not reference this catalog.

check_details.sot_fact: Gate-Pipeline Mapping: G0(Intake), G1(Plan), G2(Plan), G3(Verify), G4(Deliver)
check_details.detail: Referenced in PART2 pipeline descriptions and §7.5.1.

check_details.sot_fact: TEE 최대 반복: P0=3, P1=5, P2=10
Soft/Hard Loop: Soft 자동 1회, Hard 승인 필요

check_details.detail: PART2 L2595 includes DEC-003 in §6.5 security items.

check_details.sot_fact: 4-Layer Guardrails: L1 NeMo + L2 Guardrails AI + L3 LlamaGuard + L4 사후감사
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.5 lists all 4 layers with version assignments.

check_details.sot_fact: Decision Lock: locked=true, S3 이후 변경불가
check_details.detail: Referenced throughout PART2 and in §7.5.1 Gate 우회 불가.

check_details.sot_fact: Self-evo LOCK: 제안만 가능, 자동 적용 금지
check_details.detail: Referenced in SDAR section §6.9 Self-evo 원칙 준수.
PART2 mentions EVX chain in V1 pipeline but does not reproduce the full EVX table in §7.
Referenced via ResponseEnvelope in PART2 §2 STEP-2 but not in §7 directly.
PART2 §7 does not reference specific color codes. This is covered in CLAUDE.md §7.6 but not in PART2 cross-cut review.

findings.description: HITL 타임아웃 불일치: PART2는 '10분 auto-deny' (CLAUDE.md §7.3), MASTER_SPEC §7.9는 '기본 30분, P2 무제한'
findings.evidence: PART2 L3368 '승인 타임아웃 10분 auto-deny' vs MASTER_SPEC §7.9 L856 '기본 30분, P2는 무제한'. 이 두 값은 서로 다른 컨텍스트(일반 승인 vs HITL 개입)일 수 있으나 명시적 구분이 없어 구현 시 혼동 가능.

findings.description: V0 스키마 수: PART2=25개 vs CLAUDE.md=24개
findings.evidence: PART2 L3261 '25개 스키마' vs CLAUDE.md §10 '24개 스키마'. v15.0.0에서 AutonomyLevelSchema 추가로 25개가 됐으나 CLAUDE.md는 미갱신 상태.

findings.description: V0 모듈 스켈레톤: PART2='I-1~I-3,I-5,I-19 (5개)' vs CLAUDE.md='I-1~I-5+I-19 (6개, I-4 포함)'
findings.evidence: PART2 L3262 explicitly excludes I-4 citing READINESS §2.7. CLAUDE.md §10 includes I-4. 구현 시 I-4 포함 여부 혼동 가능.

findings.description: 워크플로우 패턴 카탈로그 12건이 PART2 §7 크로스컷 검토에 미포함
findings.evidence: MASTER_SPEC §7.14 defines 12 workflow patterns. Not referenced in PART2 review section.
